mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_MEMBER (name, nickname, phoneNumber, role) VALUES (#{name}, #{nickname}, #{phoneNumber}, 'USER')
INSERT INTO SAAS_LOGIN (email, pw, memberNo) VALUES (#{email}, #{pw}, #{memberNo})
mapper.select: SELECT SG.email AS email , SG.pw AS pw , SG.loginNo AS loginNo , SG.memberNo AS memberNo , SM.role AS role FROM SAAS_LOGIN SG JOIN SAAS_MEMBER SM ON SM.memberNo = SG.memberNo WHERE SG.email = #{email}
